sentences.target: Der Empfänger steht auf dem Paket.

translations.de: Der Empfänger steht auf dem Paket.
translations.en: The recipient is on the package.
translations.es: El destinatario está escrito en el paquete.
translations.fr: Le destinataire est écrit sur le colis.
translations.it: Il destinatario è scritto sul pacco.
translations.ko: 받는 사람 이름이 상자에 적혀 있어요.
translations.pt: O destinatário está escrito no pacote.
translations.vi: Tên người nhận được ghi trên gói hàng.
translations.nl: De ontvanger staat op het pakket.
translations.hu: A címzett rá van írva a csomagra.
translations.hi: प्राप्तकर्ता का नाम पैकेट पर लिखा है.
translations.el: Ο παραλήπτης είναι γραμμένος στο πακέτο.
translations.ja: 宛先は荷物に書いてあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject noun; agrees with 'Empfänger'.
Common noun; masculine; singular; in nominative case; head of the subject NP.
Finite verb; present tense; 3rd person singular; intransitive main predicate; agrees with the subject.
Two-way preposition; here expressing static location and thus governing the dative case.
Definite article; dative singular (neuter here); determiner within the prepositional phrase headed by 'auf'.
Common noun; neuter; singular; object of the preposition 'auf' in dative; denotes the location.

translations.fr: Je ne connais pas le destinataire.
translations.hi: मुझे प्राप्तकर्ता के बारे में पता नहीं है।

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; nominative case; subject of the clause.
Finite verb; present tense; 1st person singular; transitive; takes a direct object in accusative.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner of the direct object noun.
Common noun; masculine; singular; accusative case; direct object of 'kenne'.
Negation particle; sentential negator; scopes over the verb phrase to express negation.

sentences.target: Meine Mutter schreibt den Empfänger falsch.

translations.de: Meine Mutter schreibt den Empfänger falsch.
translations.en: My mom writes the recipient incorrectly.
translations.es: Mi madre escribe mal el nombre del destinatario.
translations.fr: Ma mère écrit mal le nom du destinataire.
translations.it: Mia madre scrive male il nome del destinatario.
translations.ko: 엄마가 받는 사람 이름을 틀리게 써요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我妈妈把收件人名字写错了。
translations.yue: 我媽媽將收件人個名寫錯咗。
translations.ru: Моя мама неправильно пишет имя получателя.
translations.pt: Minha mãe escreve o nome do destinatário errado.
translations.he: אמא שלי כותבת את שם הנמען לא נכון.
translations.vi: Mẹ tôi viết sai tên người nhận.
translations.ar: أمي تكتب اسم المستلم بشكل خاطئ.
translations.nl: Mijn moeder schrijft de naam van de ontvanger verkeerd.
translations.uk: Моя мама неправильно пише ім'я одержувача.
translations.hu: Anyukám rosszul írja a címzett nevét.
translations.hi: मेरी माँ प्राप्तकर्ता का नाम गलत लिखती हैं।
translations.pl: Moja mama źle pisze imię odbiorcy.
translations.el: Η μητέρα μου γράφει λάθος το όνομα του παραλήπτη.
translations.nb: Moren min skriver mottakerens navn feil.
translations.id: Ibu saya menulis nama penerima dengan salah.
translations.sv: Min mamma skriver mottagarens namn fel.
translations.ro: Mama mea scrie greșit numele destinatarului.
translations.cs: Moje maminka píše jméno adresáta špatně.
translations.da: Min mor skriver modtagerens navn forkert.
translations.ja: 母は受取人の名前を間違えて書きます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; 1st person singular possessor; feminine nominative singular; agrees with 'Mutter'.
Common noun; feminine; singular; nominative case; head of the subject NP.
Finite verb; present tense; 3rd person singular; transitive; main predicate; takes an accusative object.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner of the verb's direct object.
Common noun; masculine; singular; accusative case; direct object of 'schreibt' (the item being written/spelled).
Adverb of manner; modifies 'schreibt'; indicates that the writing/spelling is incorrect.

sentences.target: Der Empfänger wohnt nicht mehr hier.

translations.de: Der Empfänger wohnt nicht mehr hier.
translations.en: The recipient no longer lives here.
translations.es: El destinatario ya no vive aquí.
translations.it: Il destinatario non vive più qui.
translations.ko: 받는 사람은 이제 여기 살지 않아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 收件人已经不住在这里了。
translations.yue: 收件人已經唔喺呢度住喇。
translations.pt: O destinatário não mora mais aqui.
translations.vi: Người nhận không còn ở đây nữa.
translations.nl: De ontvanger woont hier niet meer.
translations.hu: A címzett már nem lakik itt.
translations.hi: प्राप्तकर्ता अब यहाँ नहीं रहता है।
translations.el: Ο παραλήπτης δεν μένει πια εδώ.
translations.id: Penerima sudah tidak tinggal di sini lagi.
translations.ja: 受取人はもうここに住んでいません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun; masculine; singular; nominative case; head of the subject NP.
Finite verb; present tense; 3rd person singular; intransitive; main predicate meaning 'to reside'.
Negation particle; combines with 'mehr' to express 'no longer/anymore'; scopes over the predicate.
Temporal/degree adverb; in 'nicht mehr' indicates cessation ('no longer').
Locative adverb; specifies the place of residence.

Der Empfänger wohnt nicht mehr hier.

My mom writes the recipient incorrectly.
The recipient no longer lives here.
